    unlock_town_rights = royal_tooling_rights
    unlock_town_rights = royal_jewelry_rights
    unlock_town_rights = royal_naval_rights
    unlock_town_rights = royal_textile_rights
    unlock_town_rights = royal_weaponry_rights
    unlock_town_rights = royal_book_rights
    unlock_town_rights = royal_artisan_rights
    unlock_town_rights = royal_brewing_rights
    unlock_town_rights = royal_masonry_rights
}

    age = age_1_traditions
    icon = merchant_power_from_maritime_reformation_advance
    requires = ship_building_advance
    selling_efficiency = small_trade_efficiency_bonus
}

    trade_range = 250
